page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Epidemiology & Biostatistics department.

EPIB788 Critical Readings in Epidemiology and Biostatistics (1-3 Credits) Open to master and doctoral students to discuss critical readings in Epidemiology and Biostatistics.

Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in EPIB610.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
